other_findings.finding: Mac1 is the major macrophage state in healthy adult dermis along with Mac2
Mac1 corresponds to complement-high, scavenger receptor-expressing resident macrophage

evidence_quotes.quote: Two macrophage cell states expressing CD68 are present in healthy skin. Mac1 shows higher expression of complement transcripts (C1QB, C1QC) and scavenger receptors (CD163, MARCO)
